data.name: UnexpectedErrorProcessingRequest
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: AuthenticationRequired
data.value: Authentication is required to access this resource.

data.name: PremiumRequired
data.value: A Premium subscription is required to access this feature.

data.name: InvalidDateRange
data.value: The specified date range is invalid.

data.name: NutritionLogEntryNotFound
data.value: The requested nutrition log entry does not exist.

data.name: NutritionLogEntryUnauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to modify this nutrition log entry.

data.name: NutritionLogEntryInvalidQuantity
data.value: The provided quantity is invalid. It must be a positive number.

data.name: NutritionLogEntryDeleteUnauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to delete this nutrition log entry.
